testcase.name: test_discover_users_returns_array

failure.message: AssertionError: User should have roles field assert 'roles' in {'avatar_url': 'https://avatars.steamstatic.com/aff00bc9371a63bc2014d95cfb0639689ad0e7bc_full.jpg', 'bio': '', 'created_at': '2026-02-09T22:23:39.376503+00:00', 'custom_avatar': '', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_steam_library_api.py:70: in test_discover_users_returns_array assert "roles" in user, "User should have roles field" E AssertionError: User should have roles field E assert 'roles' in {'avatar_url': 'https://avatars.steamstatic.com/aff00bc9371a63bc2014d95cfb0639689ad0e7bc_full.jpg', 'bio': '', 'created_at': '2026-02-09T22:23:39.376503+00:00', 'custom_avatar': '', ...}

testcase.name: test_user_search_with_real_users

failure.message: AssertionError: User f2375f1f-23cb-449b-ada1-d6e3614f3261 should have roles field assert 'roles' in {'avatar_url': 'https://avatars.steamstatic.com/aff00bc9371a63bc2014d95cfb0639689ad0e7bc_full.jpg', 'custom_avatar': '', 'display_name': 'Phaeton W12', 'follower_count': 1, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_steam_library_api.py:179: in test_user_search_with_real_users assert "roles" in user, f"User {user.get('id')} should have roles field" E AssertionError: User f2375f1f-23cb-449b-ada1-d6e3614f3261 should have roles field E assert 'roles' in {'avatar_url': 'https://avatars.steamstatic.com/aff00bc9371a63bc2014d95cfb0639689ad0e7bc_full.jpg', 'custom_avatar': '', 'display_name': 'Phaeton W12', 'follower_count': 1, ...}
